text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Cracking improves both reactivity proxies, but support and model spread remain condition dependent

text.style: font-size: 6px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Paired reference slice: LBV 300 K; IDT 1200 K; reactor inlet 600 K; 5 bar. White rings: joint proxy support.
